description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat green roof and a two-story structure with a mix of light and dark exterior paneling. The front facade includes a double garage, a main entrance with a small porch, and a balcony above. The property is surrounded by a fence and includes a spacious deck with outdoor seating, a dining area, and a swimming pool. There are multiple outdoor amenities such as a swing set, hot tub, sun loungers, and potted palm trees, creating a resort-like atmosphere. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces seamlessly.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat green roof, large windows, a double garage, and extensive outdoor living spaces including a pool, deck, and garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, upper balcony, and fenced yard with visible outdoor furniture and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, hot tub, swing set, and large windows along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive deck, outdoor dining area, sun loungers, and sliding glass doors leading inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the upper deck with seating, a covered patio area, and additional garden space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
